allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python manage.py makemigrations salesforce_sim coaching sync briefs users 2>&1)

Bash(venv/Scripts/python << 'PYEOF'
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

from simple_salesforce import Salesforce

sf = Salesforce\(
    username=os.environ['SF_USERNAME'],
    password=os.environ['SF_PASSWORD'],
    security_token=os.environ['SF_SECURITY_TOKEN'],
\)

print\("Connected to Salesforce!"\)
print\("Org ID:", sf.sf_instance\)

# Check what objects exist
desc = sf.describe\(\)
obj_names = [o['name'] for o in desc['sobjects'] if o['name'] in ['Account', 'Contact']]
print\("Available objects:", obj_names\)
PYEOF)

Bash(venv/Scripts/python << 'PYEOF'
from simple_salesforce import Salesforce

try:
    sf = Salesforce\(
        username='saravanarajan.b.50452b66c471@agentforce.com',
        password='Saravana715@',
        security_token='',
        domain='login'
    \)
    print\("SUCCESS! Connected to Salesforce Developer Edition!"\)
    print\("Instance:", sf.sf_instance\)
    
    # Test: list accounts
    result = sf.query\("SELECT Id, Name FROM Account LIMIT 5"\)
    print\("Accounts:", result['totalSize']\)
    
    # Test: list contacts
    result = sf.query\("SELECT Id, Name FROM Contact LIMIT 5"\)
    print\("Contacts:", result['totalSize']\)
    
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
PYEOF)
